variable_traces.candidate_indicators: 粉丝量、发布量、点赞/评论/转发、爆款指数、DCI/传播力指数、标题/音乐/内容形式
variable_traces.linked_claims: C004 (0/3 human-ready; 0/3 page-located); C003 (0/4 human-ready; 0/4 page-located); C001 (0/1 human-ready; 0/1 page-located)
variable_traces.source_trace: cnki_2021_d35f8e895a:B0011 / page pending / skimmed; cnki_2021_d35f8e895a:B0012 / page pending / skimmed; cnki_2021_d35f8e895a:B0013 / page pending / skimmed; +5 more
variable_traces.boundary: Can support visibility/interaction claims, not service-value claims alone.

variable_traces.candidate_indicators: 资源入口、活动入口、咨询/连接路径、线上线下转换、服务信息清晰度
variable_traces.linked_claims: C011 (0/5 human-ready; 0/5 page-located); C009 (0/3 human-ready; 0/3 page-located)
variable_traces.source_trace: cnki_2021_5530e86157:B0001 / page pending / skimmed; cnki_2021_5530e86157:B0003 / page pending / skimmed; cnki_2021_5530e86157:B0007 / page pending / skimmed; +5 more
variable_traces.boundary: Needs observable service path or library-service outcome before manuscript use.

variable_traces.candidate_indicators: 阅读参与、资源访问、活动报名、读者反馈、知识传播效果、分享回流
